title: Voidsong
description: Something strange has happened. The shadows are opening for those above to witness. The world is turning inside out.
body:
_Something strange has happened. The shadows are opening for those above to witness. The world is turning inside out._

NOTE: This mod is more of a proof of concept. I'm just one person using a really bad mod editor, so this mod may not be the best but it is the general groundwork for something I'd like to see :)

# What this mod adds
## Experience multiple new biomes
Explore many biomes, such as the Watching Growthlands, the Starlit Caverns, or (my favorite), the Twilight Forest!
## Find new ancient life
See many new mobs like the Monoid, a lost soul in a grey world, or the legendary Monomati who bears valuable treasures.
## New materials to help you on your adventures
Use the new rare Voided material found in the new biomes to craft a new toolset thats more powerful than netherite, but very heavy.

# More Information
## How to download
Currently Voidsong only supports the Forge modloader (NOW NEOFORGE), however more support might happen.
### For Modrinth Modloader
Open the Modrinth app, select the mod and add it to a profile.
### For Curseforge
NEW download off of the installer! We're finally here [https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/voidsong](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/voidsong).

## Where do I report bugs?
Report bugs using the link below the description that goes to the github issues page.

## Can I modify/port/revamp this mod?
Go right ahead! As long as you credit me as the original creator, I'd love to see what you can do with this. I'm not the best at modding, so having someone revamp the mod and create something better would be a dream.
